articles.title: Search and Rescue Ongoing at African Lion 2026 - africom.mil
articles.description: Two U.S. service members participating in African Lion 2026 were reported missing near the Cap Draa Training Area, near the city of Tan Tan, Morocco, May 2, 2026.
